text: The dimness and tilted angle of the world disorients me, as if I have arrived after hours or stumbled upon a place meant to be empty. The glowing emergency sign and the glass walls suggest purpose and care, yet the darkness lends a sense of abandonment. The R+D wall hints at innovation and collaboration, but it is half-swallowed by shadow, making me reflect on how ideas too can get lost if left unattended. My presence feels almost ghostly—I am here, but I wonder if I am meant to be.
